positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring abstract bioluminescent flora and geometrically perfect fauna, such as stylized glowing moths and crystalline roots. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, utilizing a high-contrast, negative space approach. Colors should be limited to deep midnight blue, glowing turquoise, electric violet, and touches of stark gold. The art style should mimic a detailed, modern linocut mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Ensure crisp outlines, strong graphic contrast, and a clean, scalable look perfect for apparel printing. Emphasis on sharp silhouettes and intricate, repeating patterns.
